title: Box 1 Basics Learning Module
text:
## Learning Goal
This module introduces the role of Box 1 income in the Dutch income tax system for frontline staff.

## Core Concept
Box 1 generally covers taxable income from work and home, including employment income and certain owner-occupied home rules.

## Helpdesk Guidance
Helpdesk staff may explain the high-level structure of Box 1 but must avoid case-specific legal conclusions when evidence is incomplete.

## Escalation
Escalate to an inspector or legal counsel when the caller asks for a binding interpretation or when multiple tax years interact.
